name: Gulf Breeze Shoreline Park Recreation Center
description: Gulf Breeze Shoreline Park Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Gulf Breeze, FL. There are 7 wood and concrete courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and food. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Guy Thompson Community Center
description: Guy Thompson Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Milton, FL. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Holley By The Sea Recreation Center
description: HBTS Pickleball Court for Members of HOA

name: Lenny James Tolbert Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lenny James Tolbert Memorial Park in Navarre, FL! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Milton Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Milton Community Center in Milton, FL! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Shoreline Park Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Shoreline Park Pickleball Courts in Gulf Breeze, FL! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.
